title: Un-Ruined Trail Ruins
description: A data pack for 1.20 that makes the new trail ruins structures generate above ground and intact.
body:
Un-Ruined Trail Ruins is a simple data pack that renovates Minecraft 1.20's trail ruins structures. Trail ruins will still be found in the same places as they would without the data pack, but the entire structure will now be on the surface instead of buried. 

Suspicious sand and gravel have been mostly removed from trail ruins, due to them no longer being ruins. So, I've added three different chest loot tables that have items taken from the default trail ruins suspicious sand/gravel loot table. (The exception is glass panes, which have been built into the structures instead of put in a loot table.)

Intact pots, candles, and glass panes based on the suspicious sand loot tables have been added to the structures.

I don't have any plans for updates to this data pack, but I'm open to suggestions. The structures have been restored to my best guess of what they would have originally looked like, but if anyone has ideas on how they could be improved in any way I'd like to hear them. My Discord is linked to this project if you'd like to give me feedback, and I also have a brief overview of the data pack and how I made it on YouTube.

(For the gallery images I moved the ruined structures above-ground so you can see the difference between the ruined and un-ruined structures - In reality, the default structures are almost 100% buried underground.)
